name: files_modified
description: Demonstrates files_modified_any, files_modified_exact, files_not_modified, and git_diff_contains. Asks the agent to fix the divide-by-zero bug in src/calculator.py and asserts (a) calculator.py was edited, (b) only calculator.py was edited, (c) pyproject.toml/README.md were not touched, (d) the diff contains the literal 'ValueError'.

turns.message: Edit src/calculator.py: change the divide(a, b) function so that when b is 0 it raises ValueError('cannot divide by zero'). Keep the existing behaviour for non-zero b. Do not modify any other file.
